hypothesis: Prefix-only robust affine GR calibration reduces typewell/horizontal measurement mismatch

hypothesis: Higher likelihood temperature and more independent particle seeds improve the stable particle floor

notes: Best fixed candidate was 65% particle blend; particle-only 13.7321; anchor 15.9099; 61.97% well win rate; not submitted

notes: Scores 9.571/7.123/7.010/7.170/7.130; best A04 ref 54809311; public rebuild and safe visible hashes matched but hidden scores differed by 2.441; daily budget exactly 5/5
